headline: HP's OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
summary: Best Buy offers the HP OmniBook X Flip 2-in-1 laptop at a significant discount. It features an Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU and 16GB RAM. The device is now $999.99, down from its original price of $1,649.99.

headline: Apple's reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
summary: AppleCare Plus subscriptions for Macs and iPads are expected to increase soon. New sign-ups will face a $0.50 monthly or $5 annual price hike. Existing subscribers, however, will maintain their current pricing.

headline: Valve says iFixit will keep selling Steam Deck batteries after all
summary: Valve has confirmed that iFixit will continue to sell batteries for the Steam Deck LCD handheld. This reverses an earlier decision to discontinue the battery, which would have impacted self-repairs. The move ensures customers can still easily purchase parts for their devices.

headline: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM 'deepfakes'
summary: Elon Musk's xAI is suing a South Carolina man for allegedly using its Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). The lawsuit claims the user intentionally circumvented safeguards to create and distribute illicit 'deepfakes'. This incident highlights the challenges of preventing AI misuse.

headline: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil Runtime Revealed, and It Matches Early Audience Reactions
summary: The official runtime for Zach Cregger's Resident Evil adaptation has been revealed by AMC Theaters. Its length is comparable to the very first 2002 Resident Evil film. The runtime aligns with initial audience reactions and expectations.

headline: The Popular Budget-Friendly Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer Drops to Just $155 Shipped
summary: The Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D printer is now available for just $155, including shipping. This deal offers an affordable way to produce consistent quality 3D prints. It's an excellent option for those seeking a budget-friendly 3D printing solution.

headline: The Tiny Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC With 24GB of DDR5 RAM and USB 4 Ports Drops Below $300
summary: A compact Aoostar Mini PC, featuring a Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H processor, is now available for under $300. It boasts 24GB of DDR5 RAM and versatile USB 4 ports. This Mac Mini-sized PC offers significant power and versatility, even for light gaming.

headline: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender Finally Gets Theatrical Release, But There's a Catch
summary: The upcoming film, 'Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender,' is set to receive a theatrical release. This marks a significant announcement for fans awaiting the movie. However, the release comes with an unspecified 'catch'.

headline: William tells England to 'hold their heads high' after defeat
summary: Prince William offered his commiserations to the England team following their defeat against Argentina. He encouraged the team to 'hold their heads high'. The Prince of Wales stated that England had 'inspired us all'.

headline: Starmer says it's the 'end of my political journey' at his final Prime Minister's Questions
summary: Keir Starmer participated in his final Prime Minister's Questions, calling it the 'end of my political journey'. MPs from all parties in the House of Commons paid tribute to the departing PM. The session included shared jokes and anecdotes across the benches.

headline: Iain Watson: Burnham faces crucial choice for chancellor as battle for No 11 continues
summary: Iain Watson reports that Andy Burnham faces a critical decision in appointing his chancellor. The choice of chancellor will send a clear signal of his future intentions and political direction. The battle for the influential role in No 11 continues.

headline: French MPs approve assisted dying law with strict rules after years of argument
summary: French MPs have approved a new assisted dying law after years of intense debate. The bill will allow assisted dying for terminally ill adults. Strict criteria must be met for individuals to be eligible under the new legislation.
